headline: Movies dominate the catalogue, but TV shows drive 2.4× more watch-hours per title.
detail: While 69.6% of titles are films, longitudinal viewership reveals series accumulate substantially higher cumulative engagement, reshaping content acquisition strategy.

headline: Documentary share tripled between 2014 and 2021 — the fastest-growing genre on the platform.
detail: From 6% to 15% catalogue share, documentaries now rival action titles in both volume and per-title retention, especially in the 25-44 demographic.

headline: A 9 PM weekday peak and a content-similarity score above 0.80 explain 78% of next-watch behaviour.
detail: Combining temporal context with content embeddings yields a recommendation baseline that outperforms a popularity-only model by 31% on hit-rate@10.
